description: It's comfort unparalleled once you slip into these white socks with the striped design from nike.These socks are perfect for Sports and casual outings.Made of cotton, nylon and spandex, it provides all-day comfort, stretch and absorption of sweatHorizontal stripes in peach and pinkBrand name woven on the sides of the cuffsRib knit cuff with roomy toe area for superior comfort and durabilitySock careMachine wash cold in 30 degree water Use non-chlorine bleachTumble dry lowDo not iron or dry clean
